Home.heroSubtitle: Book your table or order for pickup. Fresh ingredients and chef-driven recipes.
Home.phaseNote: Checkout is live. Next: real-time admin dashboard.

MenuPage.title: Menu
MenuPage.intro: Wok-style dishes. Add to your cart and review the total before checkout.

CartPage.title: Cart
CartPage.intro: Adjust quantities and check the total. You'll confirm at checkout (cash in store).
CartPage.hint: Prices are locked when you add items; the final amount is confirmed at pickup.

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.intro: Pickup in store, cash on collection. Confirm your details; totals are recomputed on the server.
Checkout.paymentNote: You will pay in cash when you pick up your order.

errors.err_lines_min: Add at least one dish to your cart.
errors.err_lines_max: Too many lines in this order.

server.UNKNOWN_DISH: A dish is no longer on the menu or is out of stock. Return to the cart and refresh.
server.CONFIG: Supabase environment variables are missing on the server (.env.local).
server.STORE_PAUSED: The restaurant has temporarily paused incoming orders due to high demand.

CheckoutSuccess.title: Thank you!
CheckoutSuccess.body: We saved your order. Show this number at the counter when you pick up.
CheckoutSuccess.invalidBody: The order id is missing or invalid.

ContactPage.title: Reservations & contact
ContactPage.body: Contact form and venue details will follow in a later phase.
